name: terminology-audit
description: Two independent terminology-audit skills for different inputs: terminology-audit audits human-facing technical/engineering docs and produces a termbase plus a written audit report; sdd-terminology-audit audits spec-driven-development (SDD) spec files and produces lint-style ambiguity alerts (plus its own termbase) that notify spec writers of the exact sentence to clarify. Choose the skill matching your input — they run independently and are not meant to be chained.
